title: Kenyan Bean Wrap
description: A delicious and healthy wrap filled with a flavorful bean and vegetable mixture. This dish is perfect for a quick and easy lunch or dinner.
instructions: Cook the dried white beans according to package instructions.
Heat a pan over medium heat and add the chopped cilantro.
Add the cooked black beans to the pan and stir to combine.
Warm the whole wheat tortilla in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
Fill the tortilla with the bean and cilantro mixture.
Roll up the wrap tightly and slice in half.
